_meta.compiled_by: Claude Code — dynamic workflow (7 web-search subagents) + live Claude-in-Chrome reads of Instagram
_meta.data_quality_note: Where live Instagram reads and cached web-search snippets disagreed, the live Chrome read is treated as authoritative (e.g., follower counts, hours).

business.name: Melado by Guluna
business.concept: Premium artisanal ice cream, shakes, and pure-fruit popsicles
business.tagline_brand: Exquisite Premium Dairy Ice Cream & Artisanal Pure Fruit Popsicles. Crafted from Natural Ingredients.
business.description: The Peshawar outlet ('Da Guluna Ice Cream Brand') of the national Melado brand by Prime Industries. Markets premium dairy ice cream (a stated 19 unique flavors), milkshakes, cones, and natural-ingredient fruit popsicles. Late-night hours and a strong social-media presence (notably larger Instagram following than the parent brand).

location.address: B1, Old Jamrud Road, near Bitani Plaza, University Town, Peshawar
landmarks: Near Bitani Plaza (also spelled Bita Plaza)

hours.note: Live Instagram bio states 1:00 AM closing; several web/Facebook listings state 2:00 AM. Confirm with the shop. No weekly closure day stated — appears to operate daily.

contact.website_note: Parent Melado brand website (no dedicated site found for the Guluna outlet).

facebook.note: Outlet content appears under 'Da Guluna Ice Cream Brand / Melado by Guluna Peshawar' posts and videos; parent page lists a 100% recommend rating from a small sample (~7 reviews).

tiktok.note: No confirmed single official handle; heavy user-generated review content exists, e.g. @foodie.owais 'Guluna Ki Ice Cream Shop Review | Melado Peshawar'.

menu.description: Premium dairy ice cream. Specific flavor names not confirmed from public sources.
Artisanal pure-fruit popsicles made from natural ingredients.

pricing.known_data_point: One @meladobyguluna Instagram post caption stated '150 each — everything in the video' (PKR 150).
pricing.full_price_list: unknown — not published publicly; held inside TikTok/Instagram videos. Contact shop for itemized prices.

brand_story.summary: Melado is a Pakistani premium dairy ice cream, fruit-popsicle, and shake brand by Prime Industries, marketed as natural / 100% organic, rich, and creamy. Publicly branded as 'Melado by Guluna' (a.k.a. 'Da Guluna Ice Cream Brand'), tying the product line to the 'Guluna' persona.
brand_story.celebrity_association: Promotional content references 'Melado X Asim Kamal X Guluna Kamal'; Melado publicly welcomed former Pakistan cricketer Asim Kamal 'to the Melado family.' Guluna Kamal (associated with Asim Kamal's family) is central to brand identity — exact role (founder vs ambassador vs namesake) is asserted via social posts, not official filings.

new_branch.event: Meet & Greet with Asim Kamal; special treats for first guests

reputation.sentiment: Overwhelmingly positive, driven by social media and local Peshawar foodie influencers rather than review aggregators.
reputation.instagram_following_note: ~58k followers is unusually large for a single-city ice cream shop.
reputation.caveats: No Google Maps star rating surfaced; verbatim influencer-video quotes and any criticism could not be extracted from search snippets. Marketing descriptors ('premium', 'creamy', 'natural') are brand language, not verified independent quotes.

well_sourced: follower counts and post counts (live Chrome read 2026-06-20)
uncertain: exact closing hour (1 AM bio vs 2 AM listings)
single_data_point: PKR 150 price from one Instagram caption — not a full price list
do_not_confuse_with: Kamal's Ice Cream & Industries Pvt. Ltd. (Howrah, West Bengal, India — unrelated)
